name: Haven Services
description_short: Haven Services is a free credit assistance provider based in Los Angeles, California. Rated 4.9/5 with 55 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Haven Services is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Los Angeles, California. Carrying a 4.9/5.0 Google rating from 55 reviews, Haven Services has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Los Angeles area looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Haven Services specializes in free credit assistance services designed to help consumers access free credit counseling and financial guidance. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Los Angeles offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Haven Services provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Los Angeles, California area who are considering Haven Services should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
